parameters.query:
SELECT id, nom, description, type_rule, conditions, action_type, action_config, priorite, actif, created_at, updated_at
FROM email_ai_rules
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.query.tenantId }}'::uuid
ORDER BY priorite ASC, created_at DESC

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(r => r.json);
return [{ json: { success: true, data: { count: rows.length, rules: rows } } }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO email_ai_rules (tenant_id, nom, description, type_rule, conditions, action_type, action_config, priorite, actif, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.nom.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.typeRule }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.conditions).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.actionType }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.actionConfig).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.priorite }},
  true,
  NOW(), NOW()
)
RETURNING *

parameters.jsCode:
const rule = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, data: rule } }];

const rule = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, data: rule } }];

parameters.query:
DELETE FROM email_ai_rules
WHERE id = '{{ ($input.first().json.body || $input.first().json).ruleId }}'::uuid
  AND tenant_id = '{{ ($input.first().json.body || $input.first().json).tenantId }}'::uuid
RETURNING id

parameters.jsCode:
const deleted = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, data: { deleted: !!deleted.id, id: deleted.id } } }];
